title: Manga Why is Volume 9 of the manga so friggin rare
display_title: Manga Why is Volume 9 of the manga so friggin rare
wikitext:
[]: [Manga] Why is Volume 9 of the manga so friggin' rare!?             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Jun 30, 2009 12:25 pm I only have volumes 1-8 of the Evangelion mangas, and recently I thought I'd try to track down volumes 9-11. Unfortunately, the manga is no longer availible in any of the book stores I've been to, and even worse, Amazon has it listed as out of print. I had no luck with eBay, and the only people who had it at Amazon's marketplace were those ridiculous scalpers who think that people will pay $300 or more for OOP merchandise. I didn't have any luck with smaller online stores either, because they all had it listed as out of stock (and if they didn't, it was just because they hadn't updated). So, with Rebuild coming out on DVD soon, is there any hope of VIZ re-issuing the Manga any time soon to cash in? Volumes 10 and 11 are still availible, but it seems like it'd be kind of dumb to have to skip over volume 9. I mean, why is it that pretty much the entire series is still availible, but NO-ONE ANYWHERE has volume 9? Did they only issue a limited run of it because they thought the Kaworu cover made it too scary, or did all of the Kaworu fangirls simply buy it up en-mass, thus creating a shortage? Oh well, either way it looks like I'm SOL for now. :(

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Jun 30, 2009 2:21 pm I'm not up on the particular manga but I do have many experiences trying to find media that's long been out-of-print my guess is in your case that manga only had a single printing, maybe two, and it didn't have the kind of demand to justify another printing in the minds of Viz Media, so yeah, you're kind of SOL my suggestion would be to keep searching every few days on eBay and other auction sites I would also look at craigslist, as well as check out comic book stores, or maybe used book stores and similar places like that in your regional area it may also be worth it to check out an anime/scifi con, they often have publications like mangas on sale at those and you may be able to find this elusive manga

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Jun 30, 2009 5:37 pm Thanks for the advice, I'll keep it in mind.

[]:             Quote Post by 8Ball231 » Tue Jun 30, 2009 6:04 pm My local Borders had tons of copies, I didn't think it was that rare O.o If you don't mind waiting delivery, the Mad Man Australia website has copies, and I'm pretty sure they ship overseas. 8Ball.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 30, 2009 6:07 pm I remember volume 9's release being a bit wonky. I couldn't find it in my area, in the end I think I asked Carl Horn to send me a copy. If you're curious about details, you could always send Carl a private message: http://forum.evageeks.org/privmsg.php?mode=post&u=164 Or we could try invoking him like Beetlejuice. Carl Horn, Carl Horn, Carl Horn...

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Jun 30, 2009 6:20 pm Thanks for the additional advice guys! :)

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Tue Jun 30, 2009 10:02 pm Strange that you can't find volume 9. I've seen copies on ebay, and on Akadot retail. It shouldn't be difficult to find from these.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Jun 30, 2009 10:56 pm I checked Akadot, but it says it's out of stock, just like every other website I've been to. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Jul 01, 2009 5:24 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Jul 01, 2009 10:32 am Foreign copies aren't too hard to come by, but if I was going to go that road I'd just import from Australia so it'll be in English. However, being the anal completist that I am, I'd prefer to get my hands on a copy from Viz so it'll match up with all the others I've gotten. An AU copy may be acceptable as a last resort, but I'd prefer to try and exhaust my other options before going that route.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 01, 2009 10:37 am Wait, this copy is rare..I did not know, I found it easily.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Jul 01, 2009 4:14 pm Timstuff wrote: However, being the anal completist that I am, I'd prefer to get my hands on a copy from Viz so it'll match up with all the others I've gotten.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:01 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Wait, this copy is rare..I did not know, I found it easily.

[]:             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:03 pm Yeah I'm really depressed right now because I have ALL the copies except for Volume 9. It cost like 300+ on amazon....

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:40 pm I was lucky enough to fine at my book store. I always buy my books on online and have them pick up at my borders.

[]:             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest » Thu Aug 13, 2009 10:16 am ^Same with me. Volume nine is the only one that I don't have because it is back ordered. What kind of binding do you all have for volume 7? It is different from all my other Eva mangas. It says action on it. I went to 3 different borders and a Book-a-million and they all have the same action binding on the side instead of just VIZ.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Aug 13, 2009 1:18 pm yeah i've never actually read the manga, not even online but ive been wanting it for sometime now but havent because i cant find a site that has every volume in stock... most dont even stock it at all. so now im waiting on the inevitable boxset once volume 12 is release *fingers crossed*

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Thu Aug 13, 2009 1:37 pm Chapters/Indigo seems to have all the volumes either in stock or "used". I've got $150 in gift certificates, but I'm not sure if I want to use it on a mixture of new and used. Hrrrrmmm... I really wish they printed more copies! How infuriating! It's supposedly a top-selling series, yet it is so rare. I'm definitely crossing my fingers for some sort of boxset, but I'm not holding my breath. I might just cave in and get a new/used mix. Fuuuuckkkkuuuuu~ I'm already saving myself for the DVD-quality fansub of 2.0, so waiting for some sort of manga boxset... I don't think my heart can take it.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Oct 05, 2009 1:41 pm I lucked out and found it used on a site called hotbooksale.com; they list it as "out of print", but they have a handful of used copies for less than the cover price.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Oct 05, 2009 2:34 pm BE CAREFUL about Hotbooksale.com! I was going to buy from them a few months back, but I found out from reviews that they will automatically bill you $20 a month for a "membership fee" without asking you if you order through them. It's a scam, and canceling the "subscription" is apparently a pain in the ass. If you've already ordered from them I suggest you get in contact with your credit card company ASAP since from the reviews I've read, that's the most reasonable way to keep them from billing you every month since their customer support is nearly non-existent.
